Then, if offset is zero, it returns buf.toString(). If not, it proceeds to calculate seconds by dividing offset by MILLIS_PER_SECOND. Then appends a colon and the formatted seconds.

The mutant changes line 279 from:

Now, considering whether the change affects only adjacent mutants. In this case, the mutant changed line 279 by replacing division with multiplication.
